name: MOST_COMMON_ORIGIN_BY_ASSIGNEE
description: Most common filing/priority country proxy using assignee origin for one assignee.
cypher: MATCH (a:Assignee)<-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]-(p:Patent) WHERE toLower(a.name) = toLower($assignee) OPTIONAL MATCH (a)-[:ORIGIN_FROM]->(o:Origin) RETURN a.name AS assignee, o.name AS origin, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count ORDER BY patent_count DESC, origin LIMIT 1;
